---
title: "Data Workshop"
author: "JF"
format: html
editor: visual
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

## Hello World!

# \>\<\> Level 1

## \>\<\> \>\<\> Level 2 (Marina's Favorite)

### \>\<\> \>\<\> \>\<\> Level 3

#### \>\<\> \>\<\> \>\<\> \>\<\> Level 4

##### \>\<\> \>\<\> \>\<\> \>\<\> \>\<\> Level 5

**bold** *italic* ***bold + italic***

-   listing
-   things

[save us, link!](https://restorationfund.org)

```{r}
## CTRL + ALT + I to make chunk ##
2 + 2
```

```{r}
#| code-fold: true

# this code only shows up if you click on dropdown to open
2+2
```

```{r}
#| echo: false

# hides code, shows output
2+2
```

```{r}
#| include: false

# this code will run but hides both code + output
2+2
```

# Script Organization feat. Penguins

## About (pseudocode)
penguins! penguins! penguins! penguins! penguins! penguins! penguins! 

## Setup 
```{r}
# load libraries ---- 
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(janitor)
library(lubridate) 
library(gghighlight)
library(sysfonts)
library(showtext)

# read in data ----
messy_penguins <- read.csv(here("data", "raw", "messy_penguins.csv")) 
nesting <- read.csv(here("data", "raw", "nesting.csv"))
```
